opportunities.user_problem: Dispatch teams react late when rider demand, driver supply, weather, and local events move at the same time.
opportunities.ai_capability: Demand forecast, supply gap clustering, and human-approved incentive recommendations.
opportunities.hypothesis: If operators receive city-zone supply gaps two hours earlier, completed trips rise while surge volatility decreases.
opportunities.mvp: Zone-level alert queue, incentive recommendation, dispatch note, and override reason capture.
opportunities.north_star: Completed rides per active supply hour
opportunities.guardrail: Cancellation rate and driver earnings volatility
opportunities.non_goal: Fully automated pricing changes without country operations approval.
opportunities.dependency: Dispatch analytics, driver incentives, legal, country operations

opportunities.user_problem: Restaurants, couriers, and customers see ETA misses too late for useful recovery actions.
opportunities.ai_capability: Late-order risk prediction, restaurant prep anomaly detection, and recovery playbook ranking.
opportunities.hypothesis: If high-risk orders are identified before courier pickup, support contacts and refund exposure decline.
opportunities.mvp: Order risk score, prep delay reason codes, courier escalation, and customer recovery message test.
opportunities.guardrail: Refund rate and courier reassignment rate
opportunities.non_goal: Changing restaurant ranking based only on model output.
opportunities.dependency: Restaurant ops, courier ops, support, lifecycle messaging

opportunities.user_problem: Missing photos, out-of-stock items, unclear modifiers, and poor descriptions reduce conversion and increase order errors.
opportunities.ai_capability: Menu issue detection, item normalization, translation support, and merchant action queue.
opportunities.hypothesis: If merchants receive prioritized catalog fixes, add-to-cart conversion and order accuracy improve.
opportunities.mvp: Catalog QA score, image and modifier checklist, merchant task feed, and before-after conversion readout.
opportunities.guardrail: Order defect rate and merchant task completion
opportunities.dependency: Merchant ops, catalog tooling, localization, analytics

opportunities.user_problem: Drivers receive inconsistent signals about where and when work is likely to be profitable.
opportunities.ai_capability: Personalized earnings forecast, shift planning suggestion, and fairness-aware intervention checks.
opportunities.hypothesis: If partners can plan profitable supply hours, marketplace liquidity improves without creating unfair exposure.
opportunities.mvp: Earnings range, recommended zones, confidence label, and feedback capture from drivers.
opportunities.north_star: Active partner hours in shortage zones
opportunities.non_goal: Guaranteed earnings or automated deactivation decisions.
opportunities.dependency: Partner product, marketplace, trust, policy, operations

opportunities.user_problem: Users who start in one service often miss relevant adjacent services because prompts are generic.
opportunities.ai_capability: Intent clustering, next-service recommendation, and offer guardrail rules.
opportunities.hypothesis: If cross-service prompts match intent and local availability, multi-service adoption increases.
opportunities.mvp: Eligibility rules, recommendation score, local supply check, and holdout measurement.
opportunities.dependency: Lifecycle marketing, service PMs, analytics, data platform

opportunities.user_problem: Users trust cash but struggle to understand when wallet balance, agents, and payment acceptance help them complete daily services.
opportunities.ai_capability: Personalized wallet prompt, agent availability prediction, and payment-method recommendation.
opportunities.hypothesis: If wallet prompts are tied to service intent and agent availability, cash-in conversion rises without harming trust.
opportunities.mvp: Contextual cash-in prompt, agent confidence badge, and controlled eligibility rules.
opportunities.guardrail: KYC failure rate and payment support contacts
opportunities.dependency: Payments, risk, compliance, agent network, lifecycle marketing

opportunities.user_problem: Safety, fraud, and abuse reports compete with routine support issues, slowing urgent intervention.
opportunities.ai_capability: Incident classification, severity routing, duplicate detection, and reviewer assist notes.
opportunities.hypothesis: If urgent incidents are routed faster with human review, response SLA improves without over-automation.
opportunities.mvp: Human-in-the-loop severity queue, duplicate clustering, reviewer rationale, and escalation audit trail.
opportunities.dependency: Support, legal, trust and safety, policy, data science

opportunities.user_problem: Corporate mobility demand arrives in bursts, making fleet budgeting and availability hard to plan.
opportunities.ai_capability: Account-level demand forecast, budget burn alert, and service reliability recommendation.
opportunities.hypothesis: If account teams can forecast demand and budget burn, renewal risk decreases.
opportunities.mvp: Weekly account forecast, budget threshold alert, and operations checklist.
opportunities.north_star: Enterprise trips completed within budget plan
opportunities.dependency: B2B product, sales, account operations, finance

experiments.primary_metric: Completed rides per active supply hour
experiments.risk_watch: Cancellation rate and driver earnings volatility
Refund rate and courier reassignment rate
Order defect rate and merchant task completion

experiments.primary_metric: Active partner hours in shortage zones

experiments.risk_watch: KYC failure rate and payment support contacts

experiments.primary_metric: Enterprise trips completed within budget plan

Is there a clear approval point before customer or partner impact?
Could recommendations create unfair partner, merchant, or user outcomes?

prd_cards.problem_statement: Dispatch teams react late when rider demand, driver supply, weather, and local events move at the same time.
prd_cards.hypothesis: If operators receive city-zone supply gaps two hours earlier, completed trips rise while surge volatility decreases.
prd_cards.mvp_scope: Zone-level alert queue, incentive recommendation, dispatch note, and override reason capture.
prd_cards.north_star: Completed rides per active supply hour
prd_cards.guardrail: Cancellation rate and driver earnings volatility
prd_cards.non_goal: Fully automated pricing changes without country operations approval.
prd_cards.stakeholders: Dispatch analytics, driver incentives, legal, country operations
prd_cards.acceptance_criteria: ["Marketplace operations lead can review the AI recommendation with a confidence label.", "The workflow captures an override reason before changing Ride hailing operations.", "The launch report shows Completed rides per active supply hour and Cancellation rate and driver earnings volatility by city cohort."]
prd_cards.risks: ["Model confidence may be misread as an automated decision.", "Country operations may need local policy or language changes.", "Sparse data in expansion markets may lower recommendation quality."]

role_alignment: Crafts a product vision for AI at marketplace scale.
Balances ride hailing, delivery, grocery, payments, partner supply, and B2B stakeholders.
Uses KPI guardrails, experiment design, and model readiness checks before launch.
Documents a roadmap decision that engineering, data science, operations, and marketing can debate.
